notes: See bundle-budgets.README.md for methodology, exclusions, and update procedure. Each entry's `rationale` field documents the per-entry headroom math and dominant symbols at a specific commit.

..rationale: re-anchored after intentional public seam/runtime export expansion; measured 975 B gzip @ v0.33.0 release verification; headroom max(ceil(975*1.2)=1170, 975+50=1025) -> 1170 (1.2x dominates)

Measured 2882 B gzip @ commit c0e5910; headroom max(ceil(2882*1.2)=3459, 2882+50=2932) → 3459 (1.2x dominates by 527 B).

./platform/sessions.rationale: new public package export budget; measured 88 B gzip @ v0.33.0 release verification; headroom max(ceil(88*1.2)=106, 88+50=138) -> 138 (+50 B floor dominates)

./platform/skills.rationale: canonical skill service: Markdown+frontmatter model, progressive-disclosure parse, and CRUD over an injectable store (filesystem + in-memory); measured 560 B gzip @ initial landing; headroom max(ceil(560*1.2)=672, 560+50=610) -> 672 (1.2x dominates)

./platform/state.rationale: re-measured 1197 B gzip after MemoryConsolidationScheduler joined the barrel (the daemon-side consolidation driver, exported so consumers stop fork-mirroring it — 2026-07-14 phantom-export find); headroom max(ceil(1197*1.2)=1437, 1197+50=1247) -> 1437 (1.2x dominates)

./platform/state/store-snapshots.rationale: StoreSnapshotScheduler + snapshot/restore/list helpers with the retention engine pieces they compose (RetentionPolicy, SnapshotPruner, RetentionClass), plus the async snapshot twin (snapshotStoreFileAsync/snapshotAllAsync) the memory-governor tripwire exit uses so a stalled disk cannot block the event loop; measured 3586 B gzip after adding the async twin; headroom max(ceil(3586*1.2)=4304, 3586+50=3636) -> 4304 (1.2x dominates)

./platform/templates.rationale: new public package export budget; measured 50 B gzip @ v0.33.0 release verification; headroom max(ceil(50*1.2)=60, 50+50=100) -> 100 (+50 B floor dominates)

./platform/tools.rationale: tool registry surface; re-measured 3507 B gzip after the exec PTY prompt-answer path landed (interactive.ts runner + detection reachable from runtime.ts, detectPtyAvailability/probePtyHost wired in registerAllTools); headroom max(ceil(3507*1.2)=4209, 3507+50=3557) -> 4209 (1.2x dominates); previously dominated by registerAllTools (~1400 B), the exec sandbox runner (~500 B), registerToolWithContractGate + tool registration logic (~600 B)

./platform/tools/exec/sandbox.rationale: per-command exec sandbox runner (detectSandboxAvailability, probeSandboxHost, buildBwrapArgv, resolveExecSandboxPlan/resolveRuntimeSandboxPlan, attachSandboxMeta + their types) exposed so consumers can detect availability and probe the host when wiring approval flows to the sandbox; measured 3578 B gzip @ commit 01b2cf4c; headroom max(ceil(3578*1.2)=4294, 3578+50=3628) -> 4294 (1.2x dominates); dominated by the bwrap-argv construction + plan-resolution logic and the command-normalization import

./platform/types.rationale: new public package export budget; measured 175 B gzip @ v0.33.0 release verification; headroom max(ceil(175*1.2)=210, 175+50=225) -> 225 (+50 B floor dominates)

./platform/utils.rationale: public platform seam; measured 227 B gzip @ commit 4e5a5e2; headroom max(ceil(227*1.2)=273, 227+50=277) → 277 (+50 B floor dominates by 4 B)

./platform/version.rationale: single-file SDK VERSION constant (cli/acp/mcp compose it) — exported for consumer composition roots after the 2026-07-14 phantom-export find; measured 245 B gzip; headroom max(ceil(245*1.2)=294, 245+50=295) -> 295 (+50 B floor dominates)

./platform/voice.rationale: public facade; grew when the spoken-turn (live TTS) policy engine was hoisted into platform/voice and re-exported here; measured 257 B gzip @ wo/tts-hoist; headroom max(ceil(257*1.2)=309, 257+50=307) → 309 (1.2x multiplier dominates)

./platform/watchers.rationale: new public package export budget; measured 132 B gzip @ v0.33.0 release verification; headroom max(ceil(132*1.2)=159, 132+50=182) -> 182 (+50 B floor dominates)

./platform/web-search.rationale: new public package export budget; measured 197 B gzip @ v0.33.0 release verification; headroom max(ceil(197*1.2)=237, 197+50=247) -> 247 (+50 B floor dominates)

./platform/workflow.rationale: new public package export budget; measured 59 B gzip @ v0.33.0 release verification; headroom max(ceil(59*1.2)=71, 59+50=109) -> 109 (+50 B floor dominates)

./platform/workspace.rationale: new public package export budget; measured 81 B gzip @ v0.33.0 release verification; headroom max(ceil(81*1.2)=98, 81+50=131) -> 131 (+50 B floor dominates)

./react-native.rationale: RN/Hermes companion surface; measured 1334 B gzip @ commit c0e5910; headroom max(ceil(1334*1.2)=1601, 1334+50=1384) → 1601 (1.2x dominates by 217 B)

./transport-core.rationale: shared transport types + observer re-export entry; measured 68 B gzip @ commit 4e5a5e2; headroom max(ceil(68*1.2)=82, 68+50=118) → 118 (+50 B floor dominates by 36 B)

./transport-direct.rationale: SDK direct-transport facade backed by transport-core; measured 91 B gzip @ commit 4e5a5e2; headroom max(ceil(91*1.2)=110, 91+50=141) → 141 (+50 B floor dominates by 31 B)

./transport-http.rationale: HTTP client primitives re-export entry; measured 68 B gzip @ commit 4e5a5e2; headroom max(ceil(68*1.2)=82, 68+50=118) → 118 (+50 B floor dominates by 36 B)

./transport-realtime.rationale: SSE + WebSocket connectors re-export entry; measured 72 B gzip @ commit 4e5a5e2; headroom max(ceil(72*1.2)=87, 72+50=122) → 122 (+50 B floor dominates by 35 B)

./web.rationale: Workers-compat companion surface; measured 202 B gzip @ commit beee912; headroom max(ceil(202*1.2)=243, 202+50=252) → 252 (+50 floor dominates)

./workers.rationale: Cloudflare Workers surface; measured 3067 B gzip @ commit c0e5910; headroom max(ceil(3067*1.2)=3681, 3067+50=3117) → 3681 (1.2x dominates by 564 B); budget bumped from 3095 (only 28 B headroom) to 3681 per re-anchor; dominated by createGoodVibesCloudflareWorker (~1200 B), readTextBodyWithinLimit + proxyDaemonBatch + proxyDaemonJson (~600 B), GoodVibesCloudflareWorkerEnv/Options/Worker interfaces + requireWorkerAuth (~400 B)
